stemHtml: The operator's Noise Abatement Departure Procedures (NADP) must normally be respected. Which of the statements is correct regarding if the NADP must be followed?

options.a: Normally yes, but they may be disregarded if they reduce flight efficiency (e.g. increase fuel consumption)
options.b: Normally yes, but they may be disregarded if the commander states it is necessary
options.c: They do not have to be followed
options.d: They may be disregarded by the commander at any time
